paper_title: Autoregressive Multi-trait Essay Scoring via Reinforcement Learning with Scoring-aware Multiple Rewards

method.name: Scoring-aware Multi-reward Reinforcement Learning (SaMRL)
key_components: Constructs multiple rewards of bi-directional QWK and MSE penalty
Integrates with batch-wise calculation to construct bi-directional QWK reward
method.approach: Treats AES as a generation paradigm, leveraging token generation probability distributions for policy gradient
advantages: Enables direct parameter updates based on scoring-aware metrics (MSE or QWK) during training
Overcomes limitations of previous methods that were restricted to classification approach

results.performance: Scoring enhancement over robust baselines across traits and prompts
key_findings: Comprehensive Analyses reveal robustness of SaMRL compared to single-reward applications and unidirectional use of QWK rewards
Significant improvements observed on prompts with broader score range

title: Autoregressive Multi-trait Essay Scoring via Reinforcement Learning with Scoring-aware Multiple Rewards
